prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-11OZCLEARGLASSTUMBLER-4PK-BUN Product Type: DRINKING_CUP Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 11oz Water Glasses Clear Tumbler Set Kitchen Essentials Everyday Glassware, 4pk Description: Upgrade your everyday glassware collection with this set of four 11oz Clear Tumbler Drinking Glasses from Beille, designed for both daily use and stylish entertaining. These versatile kitchen essentials are the perfect choice for serving water, sparkling water, juice and more. With a practical 11-ounce capacity and timeless design, they fit seamlessly into any home and kitchen, making them a must-have addition to your drinkware and glassware collections.

The classic tumbler style make these water glasses suitable for any dining occasion. Whether used as casual water glasses for Sunday brunch (hi, fresh squeezed orange juice), or styled alongside wine glasses and goblets for a dinner party, their clear, minimalist look complements any table setting. The faceted sides add both elegance and function, providing a comfortable, slip-resistant grip that is easy to hold.

Built for everyday durability, these clear drinking glasses are sturdy, reliable, and designed to last through daily use. They are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning (simply place them on the top rack), or hand wash when preferred. Their resilience makes them an excellent choice for busy households that want style without sacrificing on functionality and practicality.

With their timeless design, versatile use, and durable construction, this set of four 11oz Clear Tumbler Glasses from Beille are the perfect balance of everyday convenience and classic style: ideal for upgrading a drinkware or glassware collection, that delivers on reliability, practicality and classic style in one simple design. Search Terms: Glass tumbler; drinking glasses; kitchen essentials; glassware; water glasses; home and kitchen; farmhouse cottage cabin home kitchen décor; everyday drinking glasses; juice glass; brunch supplies; house warming gifts new home; table setting decor Features: - EVERYDAY DRINKING GLASSES: Reach for this perfect kitchen essentials clear tumbler style glass to serve water, sparkling water, juice and much more; drinking glasses feature a capacity of 11 ounces and are sold in packs of four - TABLE SETTING DECOR: The classic design of these clear tumbler water glasses lends them to any kind of table setting and home décor style; easily pair or set with other glassware like wine glasses, goblets and more for a quick and elevated table setting - CLASSIC DESIGN: Form and function meet with here with our glass tumblers; faceted sides provide an easy to hold, slip resistant and comfortable grip, while the drinking glasses classic aesthetic boasts easy and effortless convenience or styling - DISHWASHER SAFE: Sturdy, durable and long lasting, these water glasses or juice glasses are designed to withstand daily use and repeated washing; top rack dishwasher safe or handwash as needed - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.0 x 3.25 inches; Individual Weight: 0.54lbs; Set Weight: 2.16lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Set Of 4, Dishwasher Safe, Faceted Design, Slip-Resistant Grip, Everyday Kitchen Essentials

openai.title_differentiation: Faceted Grip, Dishwasher Safe, 11 Ounce Capacity, Everyday Water Juice And Sparkling Drinkware, Set Of 4
